name: Vianey Olivarria
personalization_hook: Vianey runs Chispa AZ, a signatory on the AZ Heat Standards Coalition letter to Hobbs. The April 9 2026 guidelines stopped short of the codified standard the coalition asked for. The unpublished carrier denial rate is a follow-up data point her base needs.
